emails.subject: City of Riverside
emails.body: City of Riverside Kate, just a heads up, I called to verbal a trade with Riverside and he mentioned there was another one for Cal 02, we verballed 579012.01 for Q1 02. Do not see other in system. Thanks Stephanie
